issues.likelyCause: Root motion and planted foot lock disagree.
issues.suggestedFix: Add/strengthen foot-lock correction or bake matching root motion for this interval.

issues.likelyCause: World positions come from inconsistent spaces or the retargeter is stretching the chain.
issues.suggestedFix: Verify source/target scale and make sure world positions are sampled after final skeleton update.
